overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, depicting a narrow dirt trail winding through dense woodland with trees and undergrowth visible in the limited light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with dense undergrowth on left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark forest path, illuminating the ground ahead with a flashlight

entered.detail: thick bushes and low vegetation lining the left side of the trail
tall tree trunks visible on the right side of the path
narrow dirt trail covered with leaves and pine needles
large light-colored rock or boulder situated in the middle of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a dark forest at night. Dense undergrowth lines the left side while tree trunks stand on the right. The flashlight illuminates a narrow dirt path ahead where a large rock obstacle is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with rocky embankment

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as it curves slightly to the right, passing the rock obstacle

entered.detail: tree trunks now visible on the left side as the path curves
earthen and rocky embankment rising on the right side of the trail
single tree trunk leaning over the path from the right side

segments.scene_description: As the path curves right, the dense undergrowth on the left gives way to tree trunks, while a rocky slope rises on the right. The camera passes the rock obstacle and approaches a distinctive leaning tree that extends over the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dark forest that shifts from a narrow trail flanked by undergrowth to a more rugged, rocky terrain. It begins with a flashlight illuminating a dirt path where dense foliage lines the left and tree trunks stand to the right, with a large rock obstacle visible in the distance. As the camera advances and the path curves right, the thick undergrowth on the left gives way to more tree trunks while a rocky slope rises on the right. The scene then progresses past the rock obstacle before finally approaching a distinctive leaning tree that extends over the trail.
